title: MedieCraft - Server - Cross-Platform
description: Cross-Platform server-side mods for MedieCraft, a Medieval and Roguelike Minecraft experience
body:
![MedieCraftTitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e7fc749da13601251ecc2b7ca23613538715184.png)

**This modpack has been created with the aim of rediscovering the game through an ultra-immersive, challenging world full of new things to discover throughout your adventure.**

**Roam the world, traverse biomes and worlds, fight monsters on the prowl, and explore structures and dungeons to make your armor and weapons. Forget boring mining sessions and prepare yourself for an unforgettable experience with your friends.**

**This modpack is very challenging by setting game difficulty to normal or hard. If you want to explore the world and chill, easy difficulty is recommended. Good luck if you want to play in hardcore. ;)** (This version is a bit easier compared to the standard MedieCraft modpack)

See [original modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-server).
_________________________

- 🐓 ~~**New mobs and mob variants**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 🍅 ~~**More plants**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 🏛 **Enhanced structures** and new ones
- 🛖 **Themed villages** and **structures** 
- ⛰️ **Beautiful landscapes** with new and **larger biomes** using Terralith and Tectonic
- ⚔️ **Dungeons**, **mobs**, **structures** to build your stuff using battles instead of mining
- 🎑 _**Ultra immersive environment sounds and songs**_ (limited in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 🪓 **Realistic trees**
- 🗡 ~~**New tools and weapons**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 🔦 **Dynamic Lights**
- 🎙 ~~**Proximity chat** (with voice effects depending on the environment)~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 👹 ~~**More monsters**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 🌋 ~~**Better Nether**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- 👁 ~~**Better End**~~ (not in Cross-Platform Version of MedieCraft)
- ⚡️ **Hyper fast and ultra optimized**
- 🔥 **Very challenging**

# **Compatibility**

❌ MedieCraft

❌ MedieCraft - Lite

❌ MedieCraft - Server

✅ MedieCraft - Cross-Platform

✅ MedieCraft - Lite - Cross-Platform

✅ MedieCraft - Server - Cross-Platform

✅ MC Bedrock Clients

✅ MC Java Clients (using Fabric, ViaVersion, ViaFabric, CreativeCore and GeckoLib)

# **Key notes**
- **Cross-Platform server side modpack**. Bedrock and vanilla Java players can join, even players using [MedieCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft) and [MedieCraft - Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite) can join the server.
- **See instructions** to get your server up and running in minutes !
- The mod list is available by clicking on 'versions' and then on the version number you chose to install.
- If you want to **save and quit** the server, just type `stop` in the console.
- If you can't break anything or if want you or your friends to be able to do commands and cheats, you can type `op [player_name]` directly in the server console.

# **System Requirements**
**Minimal System Requirements**

- 4GB allocated to the server

- 4 Cores / 4-8 Threads CPU (AMD Ryzen 3 3100, Intel Core i5 7400)

- 8Gb RAM 

- 1,5GB SSD storage


**Recommended System Requirements**

- 6GB allocated to the server

- 6 Cores / 12 Threads CPU (AMD Ryzen 5 5600, Intel Core i5 12400F)

- 16GB RAM

- 1,5GB SSD storage

# **Instructions**

1. Download [Fabric Server](https://fabricmc.net/use/server/) and chose the version of the loader according to the version of MedieCraft - Server and MedieCraft you want. (Example: if you are playing in 1.21, download both MedieCraft and MedieCraft - Server compatible for 1.21 **AND** [Fabric Server](https://fabricmc.net/use/server/) for 1.21)
2. Launch it using the command named `Launch Command` on [Fabric Server Website](https://fabricmc.net/use/server/). **NB: change the number `2` in `-Xmx2G` command and put how much RAM you want to allocate to the server (Example: if you want 6GB for your server, write `-Xmx6G`).**
3. Close server console by typing `stop`.
3. Accept EULA by replacing `false` to `true` in the file : `eula.txt`.
4. On Modrinth, go to your library and click on this modpack. Click on `Folder` to access the modpack's folder.
5. Copy the `mods` folder and paste it into the server folder (it should replace the empty `mods` folder previously created by Fabric)
6. Restart the server using the same command, a line mentionning that `Geyser is started`. And then, close server console again by typing `stop`.
7. Enter `Floodgate` folder in `config` folder, copy the file `key.pem` and paste it into the `GeyserMC` folder (also in the `config` folder).
8. Restart the server using the same command and your server is up and running! (If you are running the server on your computer, you may have to forward your ports but it can be dangerous so be careful!).

**NB: If you are having trouble with these instructions, you can watch [this tutorial](https://youtu.be/NwCUhAJCaR0?si=hHgCawQJX7qNfp1x). It's not mandatory to follow his GeyserMC settings, you can use default ones to play!**

# **Q&A**

- **Is this modpack compatible with both [MedieCraft - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-cross-platform) and [MedieCraft - Lite - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite-cross-platform) ?** 

Absolutely, using this modpack you can join servers using both [MedieCraft - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-cross-platform) and [MedieCraft - Lite - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite-cross-platform).

- **How much RAM should I allocate to this modpack profile ?**

4GB minimum should be fine. But 6GB is recommended if there are a lot of players or if all players are using [MedieCraft - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-cross-platform) with [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons).

- **Can I play this modpack in older versions of Minecraft ?**

Yes, to be able to play in older versions, you have to unlink the modpack at the very bottom of the modpack options. Then change the version of Minecraft and update all mods by clicking on 'update mods'. Start the game and it should launch if all mods are compatible with the selected version of Minecraft.

- **Is this modpack Cross-Platform ?**

Yes, this mod pack is Cross-Platform for Java and Bedrock version. If you are running your game on console, you can follow [this tutorial](https://youtu.be/zBpP-kBXicc?si=GsARunGE3WSn-21e) to join the server!

- **Can I use this server modpack with a client running [MedieCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft) ?** 

No, you can only play with [MedieCraft - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-cross-platform) and [MedieCraft - Lite - Cross-Platform](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mediecraft-lite-cross-platform) modpacks only.




# **Credits**
